resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def appendCharacters(self, s: str, t: str) -> int:
        i = j = 0
        m, n = len(s), len(t)
        while i < m and j < n:
            if s[i] == t[j]:
                j += 1
            i += 1
        return n - j
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(m + n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Two-pointer greedy scan: advance through s and t simultaneously, matching characters of t in order. The remaining unmatched suffix of t is exactly what must be appended.
